body.title: Audit step: verify new switches have end-to-end wiring before enabling
body.result: wiring_check.py: scans enabled switches for unreferenced or stub-near-gate issues. Audit skill step 18.5 added. 17 tests.
body.description: Add audit step: for each switch flipped to true, verify the feature produces real user-facing output (not stubs/debug labels). Catches the pattern where we build components, wire them, flip a switch, but the output path still has a stub. Specific check: if IGOR_TURN_PIPELINE=true, verify VoiceProducer is not the stub. If IGOR_CALVING_ENABLED=true, verify calve_subtree is reachable. Generalizable pattern for any gated feature.
